name: case16_large_file_job
description: Case 16: Large file ingestion - S3 pipe-delimited source to S3 gzip CSV
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1": {"S3CsvSource": {"AdditionalOptions": {"EnableSamplePath": false, "SamplePath": ""}, "Exclusions": [], "Name": "S3 CSV Source - case16_large_file", "OptimizePerformance": false, "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": []}], "Paths": ["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/raw/case16_large_file/"], "QuoteChar": "quote", "Recurse": true, "Separator": "pipe", "WithHeader": true}}, "node-2": {"SparkSQL": {"Inputs": ["node-1"], "Name": "SQL Query", "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": []}], "SqlAliases": [{"Alias": "myDataSource", "From": "node-1"}], "SqlQuery": "SELECT NULLIF(TRIM(TRANSACTION_ID), '') AS TRANSACTION_ID, NULLIF(TRIM(ACCOUNT_NUMBER), '') AS ACCOUNT_NUMBER, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(TRANSACTION_DATE), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS TRANSACTION_DATE, NULLIF(TRIM(TRANSACTION_TIME), '') AS TRANSACTION_TIME, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(AMOUNT), '') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS AMOUNT, NULLIF(TRIM(CURRENCY), '') AS CURRENCY, NULLIF(TRIM(TRANSACTION_TYPE), '') AS TRANSACTION_TYPE, NULLIF(TRIM(MERCHANT_NAME), '') AS MERCHANT_NAME, NULLIF(TRIM(MERCHANT_CATEGORY), '') AS MERCHANT_CATEGORY, NULLIF(TRIM(BRANCH_CODE), '') AS BRANCH_CODE, NULLIF(TRIM(CHANNEL), '') AS CHANNEL, NULLIF(TRIM(STATUS), '') AS STATUS, NULLIF(TRIM(REFERENCE_NUMBER), '') AS REFERENCE_NUMBER, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(VERSION_DATE), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS VERSION_DATE, TO_TIMESTAMP(NULLIF(TRIM(ETL_UPDATE_DATE), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource"}}, "node-3": {"S3DirectTarget": {"AutoDataQuality": {"IsEnabled": false}, "Compression": "gzip", "Format": "csv", "Inputs": ["node-2"], "Name": "S3 Gzip CSV Target", "NumberTargetPartitions": "0", "PartitionKeys": [], "Path": "s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case16_large_file/load/", "SchemaChangePolicy": {"EnableUpdateCatalog": false}}}}
